name: @absolutejs/beacon
description: Tiny, zero-dependency browser SDK for the AbsoluteJS observability stack. Captures uncaught errors + unhandled rejections, breadcrumbs (console/click/fetch/history), batches, and POSTs an envelope to @absolutejs/errors/ingest via sendBeacon/keepalive. ~2-5KB gz, no Effect in the browser; end-to-end type-safe via the shared erased envelope contract.
author: Alex Kahn

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts src/manifest.ts --outdir dist --root ./src --sourcemap --target=browser --external web-vitals && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && absolute-manifest emit
scripts.check:package: bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run test
scripts.release: bun run format && bun run check:package && bun publish
